key_risks: Hawkish FOMC June 17 reaction hits all equity sectors, especially if dot plot shifts
Oil reversal on demand fears or OPEC supply surprise undermines ENERGY overweight
Soft June CPI sparks growth/tech rally leaving defensive tilt behind benchmark
Healthcare policy headlines (CMS drug pricing) pressure XLV

portfolio.rationale: Defensive sector with positive momentum (+5.23% 30d), low valuation, benefits from risk-off given sticky inflation and weak sentiment.
Quality dividend tilt outperforming in choppy tape; defensive with value characteristics amid stagflationary signals.
WTI at $90, EIA forecasts inventory draws of 2.6mb/d; energy showing relative strength with strong trailing returns.
FY2027 $1.5T defense budget request supports orders; positive 30d momentum during broad market weakness.
Hot CPI/PPI (3.8%/6.0% YoY), high VIX (21.5), bearish AAII spread; cash-like buffer earning ~3.6% with FOMC June 17 risk.

portfolio_rationale: Defensive-cyclical barbell given stagflationary mix: hot inflation (PPI +1.4% MoM, CPI 3.8% YoY), weakening sentiment (UMich 44.8), but resilient labor/ISM. Tilt to defensives (healthcare, dividend), inflation-beneficiary energy, defense policy tailwind, and short Treasuries to dampen FOMC/CPI-week volatility.
rationale_summary: Stagflation-tilt barbell: defensive equity (HEALTHCARE, DIVIDEND), real-asset/policy beneficiaries (ENERGY, AEROSPACE_DEFENSE), and short Treasury buffer ahead of June CPI and FOMC.
